level_signals: 6+ years of experience in risk program management, strategy, management consulting, business operations, or operations program management
Leads complex global programs with cross-functional stakeholders
No people management signals in JD

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of experience in risk program management, strategy, management consulting, business operations, or operations program management
The ability to dig deep into the data and think from first principles while delivering the best results
Ability to manage multiple stakeholders with varying priorities and drive creative solutions and commitment to a shared goal
Strong program management skills with experience managing end-to-end execution of projects and programs that have transformed your company's operations
Enjoys solving complex and hard problems and can turn incomplete, conflicting, or ambiguous inputs into solid action plans and deliver quantifiable business impact
Ability to identify repeated user and specialist-facing issues and build scalable solutions and processes to address them

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with SQL or willingness to learn
Prior experience partnering with Product, Eng, and Operations teams preferred

scope.surface: Risk Operations Enablement — core business and strategic programs for Risk Operations, including operational excellence and cross-functional initiatives
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency improvements within Risk Operations
Prevention of bad actors exploiting systems
core_responsibilities: Lead complex global programs, from initial scoping to design and execution and work on high-impact strategic initiatives
Collaborate with multiple stakeholders across Risk Operations, Risk Product, Risk Eng, and other stakeholder teams (e.g., Policy, Data Science) to prioritize and maximize the impact of your projects
Design and launch programs that lead to step-change improvements in our operational processes and business outcomes
Serve as the Risk Operations expert and partner closely with our cross-functional stakeholders to scope and execute large projects to create operational efficiencies and ensure operational readiness
Embody our Operating Principles and foster our values and culture

Stripe is a well-known, scaled fintech with strong brand for career development
